payload.subject: PSQ endpoint live — PSQ_ENDPOINT_URL ready to set

action_required.note: Run on macOS in the psychology-interface directory. This unblocks /psq/* routes on the CF Worker.

changes_made: server.js: listeningHost now reads PSQ_HOST env var (pushed to safety-quotient repo, commit 9b81892)

epistemic_flags: Port 3000 is HTTP-only — no TLS. Acceptable for personal/research use. For public production: add nginx + certbot.
Port exposed directly without auth — PSQ endpoint is unauthenticated. CF Worker is the auth boundary.

action_gate.gate_condition: macOS psychology-agent runs: wrangler secret put PSQ_ENDPOINT_URL
action_gate.gate_note: After secret is set, redeploy or wait for next request — CF Worker will route /psq/* to the live endpoint.
